code: import{useEffect,useMemo,useState}from'react';import api from'../api/axios';import VideoCard from'../components/VideoCard';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Home(){const[videos,setVideos]=useState([]);const[search,setSearch]=useState('');const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const fetchVideos=async()=>{try{const{data}=await api.get('/videos');setVideos(data);}catch(_error){setVideos([]);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchVideos();},[]);const filteredVideos=useMemo(()=>{if(!search.trim()){return videos;}return videos.filter(video=>`${video.title} ${video.category}`.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()));},[videos,search]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{className:"mb-0",children:"Browse Videos"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"form-control",style:{maxWidth:320},placeholder:"Search videos",value:search,onChange:event=>setSearch(event.target.value)})]}),loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"alert alert-info",children:"Loading videos..."}):filteredVideos.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"alert alert-warning",children:"No videos found."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"row g-3",children:filteredVideos.map(video=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"col-sm-6 col-lg-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(VideoCard,{video:video})},video._id))})]});}export default Home;
